headline: Netflix To $100? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Thursday
summary: Wall Street analysts changed outlook for top names. Mizuho raised Chubb target, JP Morgan cut Costco target, B of A and Wells Fargo reduced targets.

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Neutral on Steel Dynamics, Lowers Price Target to $260
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Lawson Winder   maintains Steel Dynamics (NASDAQ:STLD) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $280 to $260.
